chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الدُّعَاءِ عِنْدَ النَّوْمِ وَ الِانْتِبَاهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 49 – The supplication at sleep time and when waking up

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/295)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق كالصحيح - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (2/295)
text: كَانَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( صلوات الله عليه )  يَقُولُ اللَّهُمَّ إِنِّي أَعُوذُ بِكَ مِنَ الِاحْتِلَامِ وَ مِنْ سُوءِ الْأَحْلَامِ وَ أَنْ يَلْعَبَ بِيَ الشَّيْطَانُ فِي الْيَقَظَةِ وَ الْمَنَامِ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from his father, from Abdullah Bin Maymoun,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullahasws having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineenasws used to say: ‘O Allahazwj! I seek Refuge with Youazwj from the wet dreams and the evil dreams, and that the Satanla would play with measws during the wakefulness and the sleep’.
en.sarwar: 5. A number of our people have narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from his father from ‘Abd Allah ibn Maymun from abu ‘Abd Allah (a.s.) who has said the following: “Amir al-Mu’minin, Ali ibn abu Talib (a.s.) would say, ‘O Lord, I seek protection with You against wet dreams and bad dreams and from Satan playing with me during my sleep or when awake.’”
